summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bookvia marketplace - Backend APIs 100% functional, Homepage and Login working, but Search page has critical SelectItem error preventing usage

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing React runtime errors - entire search page broken and unusable
ui_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This is because the Select value can be set to an empty string to clear the selection and show the placeholder.
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access search functionality at all - complete feature failure

integration_issues.issue: Category cards navigate to search page but page fails to render due to SelectItem error

passed_tests: Categories API returns 8 seeded categories with multilingual names
Phone verification mock returns dev_code in development
User registration creates accounts and returns JWT tokens
Homepage loads with hero, search bar, categories (8 cards), how-it-works, business CTA sections
Login page fully functional with User/Business toggle, form validation, backend integration
Category cards clickable and navigate correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (Homepage + Login working, Search page critical failure)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem empty string value in SearchPage.jsx line 144. Change value="" to value="all" or similar non-empty string to resolve React error that completely breaks search functionality. This is blocking core user functionality.
